input.reasoning: Selected Flight 1 (JetBlue B6 624) as the best value option. At $277 per person ($831 total for 3 travelers), it fits comfortably within the $1,050 budget. input.final_message_to_user: Great news! I found a perfect non-stop flight for your July 4-11 trip from Los Angeles to New York. At $831 total for all 3 travelers, you're well within your $1,050 budget with $219 to spare for activities and meals in New York. Have a wonderful trip!
